productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Adistar Ride 3  White  Sports Shoes
description: Designed for those want the lightest running shoe without sacrificing support and performance, this AdiStar Ride 3 shoe is a mere 358 grams.  If you're at the peak of your game you want a shoe that will take you all the way and adidas have put the most advanced technology into this shoe while keeping the weight light.UpperMicrosuede and mesh upper for maximum breathable comfort and styleadidas Patented 3-Stripes in black plus reflective features on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and visibility Geofit build with meshed and padded collar and tongue and fabric inner for all-day snug comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitSoft footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleAdiPrene midsole for an absolutely cushioned ride, lightweight comfort and enhanced impact protectionHeel stabilizer in the heel for absolute impact protection for the backfoot and anklesTORSION midfoot OutsoleDurable rubber outsole with flex grooves and lugs for absolute grip in all kinds of weatherShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
